description: Duplicate literal keys — last-wins (§59.3). The literal [ "DAL": 3, "DAL": 5 ] has two depth-1 entries whose keys are §45-equal; the later entry overwrites the earlier (last-wins, matching .insert overwrite semantics), and the compiler surfaces the overwrite with W-MAP-DUPLICATE-LITERAL-KEY. Asserts the code fires AS Info: §59.11/§34 declare W-MAP-DUPLICATE-LITERAL-KEY Info-level (the W- prefix partitions it into result.warnings; the severity LABEL is Info, matching W-MAP-ITERATION-ORDER). The prior spec-vs-impl 'warning' severity-label divergence is now fixed and enshrined here.
rationale: §59.3 a map literal with two depth-1 entries whose keys are §45-equal is last-wins; the compiler MAY surface the overwrite with W-MAP-DUPLICATE-LITERAL-KEY (Info, §59.11).
